title: Accounts Associate
metaDescription: Accounts Associate role in WTP Advisory's Outsourcing Department in Singapore: maintain full sets of accounts, reconciliations, GST and statutory reporting for clients.
description: Join our rapidly expanding team. We are looking for an experienced Associate – Accounts to join our Outsourcing Department in Singapore.
duties: Maintain full sets of accounts and prepare monthly management reports for a portfolio of clients.
Process accounts payable, accounts receivable, and bank reconciliations accurately and on time.
Prepare GST returns and ensure compliance with statutory reporting requirements.
Assist with year-end audit schedules and liaise with auditors and clients.
Support the team on ad-hoc finance and accounting assignments.
requirements: Diploma or Degree in Accountancy, Finance, or a related field.
1 – 2 years of relevant accounting experience, preferably in an outsourcing environment.
Familiarity with accounting software and a good working knowledge of MS Excel.
Meticulous, organised, and able to manage multiple client deadlines.
remuneration: Remuneration will be commensurate with qualifications and experience.
